title: Upload Posts - Upload Videos to Social Media
h1: Upload to all platforms with one click
bodyText: Upload Post Users API Keys Upload Calendar Analytics Pricing Docs 👑 Manual Shorts Uploader Upload to all platforms with one click Manually upload content to multiple social media platforms at once. As you configure your upload, the equivalent cURL command is generated below — copy it into automation workflows with tools like n8n or Make. For full automation, use our API and enjoy all params and options. Need a head start? Browse ready-made workflow templates at upload-post.com/n8n-templates. Set up core content Pick the profile, content source, and primary copy. File · image Platform-specific settings Enable each network and fine-tune channel options. 9 platforms Scheduling & submission Choose when to publish and finalize the request. Queue Post preview xkksLA9bPvHLwx4nThvU TikTok LinkedIn Threads Bluesky Pinterest Facebook Instagram YouTube X Add to queue · File (Image) TITLE No title set TYPE Image CONFIDENTIALITÉ Public RESTRICTIONS TIKTOK Duos Commentaires Stitch UploadPost Your API solution for all social media platforms. Simplifying content management for developers and creators.
